description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service. Define stages build, test, release, deploy and set variables CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE=$REPO:latest, CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE=$REPO:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, REPO=registry.gitlab.com/christophs/aws_adfs. Add a build job in the build stage that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build --no-cache -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. Add a latest-image job in the release stage that runs only on the master branch and executes docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE and docker push $CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE.
